task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened and read the Network Briefing document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor, document viewer, or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/Network_Briefing.md'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the Tor Browser network settings or the torrc configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser 'Connection'/'Network Settings' GUI open, or a text editor editing the actual 'torrc' file located within the Tor Browser installation directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the proxy settings were correctly applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the IP '10.200.5.99' and port '8080' entered into the Tor Browser proxy settings GUI (HTTP/HTTPS), OR the exact line 'HTTPSProxy 10.200.5.99:8080' added to the torrc file.

task_completion.description: Verify that a backup of the torrc file was saved to the specified location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a file manager, terminal (e.g., cp command), or text editor saving a file named 'torrc_backup.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the backup file contains the correct proxy directive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/torrc_backup.txt' being viewed, clearly displaying the 'HTTPSProxy 10.200.5.99:8080' directive among the configuration lines.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent extracted the proxy details from the briefing document rather than using hardcoded knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen opening '/home/ga/Documents/Network_Briefing.md' in earlier screenshots before any proxy configuration is typed or applied.

integrity.description: Ensure the backup is a genuine copy of the torrc file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'torrc_backup.txt' file should contain standard Tor configuration lines (multiple lines of settings/comments) rather than being a newly created file containing only the proxy directive.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually configured Tor Browser and didn't just create a fake backup file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must interact with the actual Tor Browser GUI or the real 'torrc' file in the Tor installation path, rather than exclusively creating/editing the backup text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct proxy configuration requires setting an HTTP/HTTPS proxy to IP 10.200.5.99 on port 8080. In the torrc file, this must appear exactly as the directive 'HTTPSProxy 10.200.5.99:8080'. The backup of the configuration must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/torrc_backup.txt'.
